properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v5 v6 v7

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Its always been a mystery to me, How two hearts can come together, And love can last forever. But now that I have found you I believe, That a miracle has come when God sends the perfect one. Now gone are all my questions about why, And I've never been so sure of anything in my life

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Oh I wonder what God was thinking, when he created you. I wonder if He knew everything I would need, Because he made all my dreams come true. When God made you, He must have been thinking about me.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Ooo ooo, I promise that wherever you may go, wherever life may lead you, With all my heart I'll be there too. And from this moment on I want you to know, I'll let nothing come between us, and I will love the ones you love. Now gone are all my questions about why And I've never been so sure of anything in my life

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: He made the sun, He made the moon To harmonize the perfect tune One can't do without the other they just have to be together. And that is how I know its true, You're for me and I'm for you Coz' my world just can't be right Without you in my life

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Oh I wonder what God was thinking, when he created you. I wonder if He knew everything I would need, Because he made all my dreams come true.

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: He must have heard ev'ry pray'r I've been praying. Yes He knew everything I would need

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: When God made you, When dremas came true When God made you, He must've been thinking About me.
